summary: Verified Round-Two Hover follow-ups end-to-end. Backend: all 16 pinned tests in test_haugh_round_two.py PASS; new integration suite test_iteration_47_haugh.py (3 tests) PASS — waste_pct_applied=0.10 + geometry_basis.label on default hover-lp-run, facade_scope custom(wrap=2376,excluded={brick:234}) yields lap qty=286 with 2376 in basis label, LETRICK photo-path regression still 11055.71 total_sell with waste_pct_applied=0.10. Frontend on the LETRICK LP SmartSide estimate: lp-waste-applied-chip renders 'waste: 10% in formulas' next to lp-source-chip 'source: AI Photo Measure' with no layout break; hover-import-btn opens hover-warning-modal correctly; lp-material-list-panel + lp-default-profile-picker + lp-compare-toggle all render. hover-restore-btn / takeoff-recon-card / facade picker not exercised because LETRICK has no cached Hover measurements (photo-path) — spec explicitly notes this absence is EXPECTED, not a bug.
verified_pass: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_47_haugh.py -> 3/3 PASS (default hover-lp-run waste+basis, facade_scope custom 2376, LETRICK regression)
Temp estimate cleanup: ZZ_ITER47_HAUGH_TEMP created & DELETEd after test run
lp-waste-applied-chip = 'waste: 10% in formulas' visible next to lp-source-chip on LETRICK LP SmartSide estimate; no layout break
LP panel testids present: lp-material-list-panel, lp-default-profile-picker, lp-compare-toggle
critical_code_review_comments: Review request references frontend testid 'lp-compare-profiles-toggle' but implementation uses 'lp-compare-toggle' (LpMaterialListPanel.jsx:517). Cosmetic naming drift; consider aligning or documenting in the spec.

hover-restore-btn / takeoff-recon-card / hover-facade-scope-picker code paths could not be exercised end-to-end in this iteration because the only LP_smart estimate available (LETRICK 8f95c9c2...) is photo-path (no cached Hover measurements). Suggest keeping/creating a dedicated LP_smart estimate with cached Hover measurements + facade_breakdown available in the test env for future regression.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable UI paths (restore/recon/facade picker not exercised — see note)

seed_data_creation: Temp estimate created (customer_name ZZ_ITER47_HAUGH_TEMP) then DELETEd. LETRICK read-only preview calls only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Round-Two follow-ups (waste display sync, ISC pooling, facade wrap-default + picker) are green at code + API + UI-chip level. To fully exercise the Hover-restore preview modal (recon-waste-figure, hover-facade-scope-picker, facade-scope-summary) end-to-end in the browser, a real LP_smart estimate with cached hover measurements is needed — the review request only supplies photo-path LETRICK for read-only regression.
